args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2018-01-01' AND DATE '2018-12-31' AND "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2018-01-01' AND DATE '2018-12-31' AND "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2018-01-01' AND DATE '2018-12-31' AND "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2018-01-01' AND DATE '2018-12-31' AND "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND TIMESTAMP '2018-12-31 23:59:59' AND "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND TIMESTAMP '2018-12-31 23:59:59' AND "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN try_strptime("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND TIMESTAMP '2018-12-31 23:59:59' AND "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN try_strptime("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2018-01-01' AND TIMESTAMP '2018-12-31 23:59:59' AND "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

- IXIC (NASDAQ Composite): 36 up days, 49 down days → not more up than down
- GSPTSE (Toronto Stock Exchange / S&P/TSX Composite): 34 up days, 48 down days → not more up than down

Answer: NYA
